SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.safety.depressurization

Class DynamicBlowdownFlareStudyDataSource.BlowdownSource

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.depressurization.DynamicBlowdownFlareStudyDataSource.BlowdownSource
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
DynamicBlowdownFlareStudyDataSource
public static final class DynamicBlowdownFlareStudyDataSource.BlowdownSource extends Object implements Serializable
One protected equipment source connected to blowdown or relief disposal.

  • Method Details

    • builder

      public static DynamicBlowdownFlareStudyDataSource.SourceBuilder builder(String sourceId, SystemInterface fluid)
      Creates a source builder.
      Parameters:
      sourceId - source id
      fluid - initial source fluid at operating pressure and temperature
      Returns:
      source builder

      Gets vessel volume.
      Returns:
      vessel volume in m3

      public double getOrificeDiameterM()
      Gets blowdown orifice diameter.
      Returns:
      orifice diameter in m

      public double getDischargeCoefficient()
      Gets discharge coefficient.
      Returns:
      discharge coefficient

    • getBackPressureBara

      public double getBackPressureBara()
      Gets backpressure.
      Returns:
      backpressure in bara

    • getStopPressureBara

      public double getStopPressureBara()
      Gets stop pressure.
      Returns:
      stop pressure in bara

    • getEffectiveFireHeatInputW

      public double getEffectiveFireHeatInputW()
      Gets configured or API 521 calculated fire heat input.
      Returns:
      fire heat input in W, or 0 if not configured

    • hasWallModel

      public boolean hasWallModel()
      Checks if wall model inputs are configured.
      Returns:
      true if wall model can be enabled

    • getWallMassKg

      public double getWallMassKg()
      Gets wall mass.
      Returns:
      wall mass in kg

    • getWallAreaM2

      public double getWallAreaM2()
      Gets wall area.
      Returns:
      wall area in m2

    • getWallSpecificHeatJPerKgK

      public double getWallSpecificHeatJPerKgK()
      Gets wall specific heat.
      Returns:
      specific heat in J/kg/K

    • getWallHeatTransferCoeffWPerM2K

      public double getWallHeatTransferCoeffWPerM2K()
      Gets wall heat-transfer coefficient.
      Returns:
      heat-transfer coefficient in W/m2/K

    • hasPsvSizingBasis

      public boolean hasPsvSizingBasis()
      Checks if PSV sizing inputs are available.
      Returns:
      true if PSV sizing can be calculated

    • getPsvSetPressureBara

      public double getPsvSetPressureBara()
      Gets PSV set pressure.
      Returns:
      PSV set pressure in bara, or NaN if not configured

    • getPsvOverpressureFraction

      public double getPsvOverpressureFraction()
      Gets PSV overpressure fraction.
      Returns:
      overpressure fraction

    • isBalancedBellowsPsv

      public boolean isBalancedBellowsPsv()
      Checks if PSV is balanced bellows.
      Returns:
      true if balanced bellows

    • isRuptureDiskInstalled

      public boolean isRuptureDiskInstalled()
      Checks if rupture disk is installed upstream of PSV.
      Returns:
      true if rupture disk is installed

      Gets source evidence references.
      Returns:
      immutable references
